# geo

```go
import "github.com/shaobaobaoer/solarsage-mcp/pkg/geo"
```

Package geo provides geocoding and timezone resolution for geographic coordinates.

Geocode converts a location name to latitude, longitude, and timezone using an external geocoding API. TimezoneFromCoords determines the IANA timezone identifier for a given latitude/longitude pair using an offline lookup with online fallback.

## Index

- [func Geocode\(locationName string\) \(\*models.GeoLocation, error\)](<#Geocode>)
- [func TimezoneFromCoords\(lat, lon float64\) string](<#TimezoneFromCoords>)

```go
func Geocode(locationName string) (*models.GeoLocation, error)
```

Geocode converts a location name to geographic coordinates using Nominatim.

<a name="TimezoneFromCoords"></a>

```go
func TimezoneFromCoords(lat, lon float64) string
```

TimezoneFromCoords returns the IANA timezone for a given latitude/longitude.
